name: Help1RVA Service Directory
key_fields: org name, service type, languages, address, hours
notes: Primary service data source; export format needs verification before hackathon

name: FindHelp / Aunt Bertha
notes: National platform; Richmond coverage exists; interoperability with Help1RVA is gap

name: Virginia 211
key_fields: service categories, provider names, contacts, coverage
notes: Statewide; Richmond coverage may be thinner than Help1RVA

name: US Census ACS — Language and Nativity
key_fields: foreign-born population, language spoken at home, English proficiency, year of entry
notes: 5-year estimates; use for population context only; no individual data

name: Virginia Office of New Americans
key_fields: refugee arrivals, resettlement locations, program participation
notes: State aggregate; Richmond-specific numbers may require direct contact

name: City of Richmond Open Data
notes: Social services section may be limited; verify coverage before relying on it

name: GRTC Transit — GTFS Feed
key_fields: route lines, stop locations, frequency, schedules
notes: Useful for transit access overlay on service maps

name: United Way Richmond Partner Directory
owner: United Way of Greater Richmond & Petersburg
key_fields: organization names, program descriptions, contact info
notes: Useful for compiling community org list; no structured export known

name: Richmond Community Foundation Grantees
key_fields: grantee names, focus areas, contact info
notes: Useful for identifying organizations serving immigrant/refugee communities

name: Cross-Agency Referral Pathway
notes: D3=1; this is the primary data gap for Statement 2; no cross-agency intake dataset exists

name: Priority Language Usage by Organization
key_fields: org name, languages served, communication channels used
notes: Anecdotally: Spanish, Arabic, Nepali, Burmese likely; needs confirmation

name: WhatsApp and SMS Channel Usage Patterns
key_fields: channels used, frequency, reach, trusted senders
notes: Critical for trusted messenger tool design; no public data source
